meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve overwhelmed by AI tools (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome overwhelmed by AI tools. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: overwhelmed by AI tools

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup: A Freelancer’s Guide to Efficiency
content.seo_description: Stop drowning in AI tools. Master Claude Code setup to automate your workflow, ship faster, and scale your freelance dev business with this expert checklist.
content.answer_block: Eliminate tool fatigue by centralizing your development within Claude Code. By integrating Antigravity for architectural oversight and Claude Code for terminal-based execution, you transform your CLI into an autonomous engineering workstation. This setup reduces context switching, automates boilerplate, and allows you to deliver production-ready code with surgical precision.
content.intro:
The modern freelance landscape is a graveyard of half-baked side projects and 'must-have' tools. You’re juggling a dozen LLM interfaces, trying to keep track of brittle codebases while client deadlines loom like storm clouds. The cognitive load is killing your velocity, turning your development process into a chaotic scramble rather than a streamlined craft.

But there is a way out. By leveraging Claude Code as your primary interface and Antigravity for structured architectural planning, you shift from being a tool-user to an AI-augmented architect. This isn't just about coding faster; it's about building a repeatable, professional system that handles the grunt work while you focus on high-value business logic.

steps.title: Environment Sanitization & Auth
steps.description: Establish a clean slate by configuring your Claude Code profile and API credentials to ensure high-speed, authenticated access to the Anthropic models.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit my current development environment. Identify bottlenecks in my local CLI configuration and suggest a streamlined path for Claude Code integration.

steps.title: Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your project structure before writing a single line of code, ensuring the AI understands your system constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular project directory structure for a high-performance SaaS MVP. Define core dependencies and security best practices.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create the file structure based on the Antigravity blueprint'

steps.title: Automated Boilerplate Deployment
steps.description: Leverage Claude Code to execute the scaffold generation, ensuring consistency across all your client projects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a prompt for Claude Code to generate the base Auth and Database schema using Prisma and Next.js.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Scaffold the authentication module using the provided schema'

steps.title: Contextual Code Injection
steps.description: Feed specific documentation or legacy code snippets into Claude Code to ensure the new features align with existing project standards.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this legacy module and extract the design patterns for the new feature implementation.

steps.title: Autonomous Quality Assurance
steps.description: Task Claude Code with writing unit tests and performing a security audit on the generated code before deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a test suite strategy for the newly created modules to ensure 90% coverage.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Write unit tests for all new functions and audit for common security vulnerabilities'

pro_tips: Always use 'claude config' to pin your model to the latest Sonnet version to prevent unexpected behavior shifts.
Keep a 'context.md' file in your root; Claude Code reads this automatically to understand project-specific nuances.
Use Antigravity to generate 'negative constraints' (e.g., 'Do not use external libraries for X') to keep your dependency tree lean.
Alias your most frequent Claude Code commands in your .zshrc to reduce keystrokes and maintain flow-state.
Run 'claude review' periodically on large refactors to catch hallucinations before they get committed to your production branch.
content.next_steps: Begin by auditing your current project folder with Antigravity, then initialize Claude Code in that same directory to see the immediate boost in task completion speed.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your tools and start shipping the software your clients deserve. The transition from manual coding to AI-augmented development is the most significant competitive advantage you can secure this year. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
